name: embedded-workbench
description: Embedded C/C++ firmware development toolbox — 4 agents, 8 skills covering FreeRTOS, ISR, NVM storage, Keil MDK (AC5/AC6), ARMCLANG, HardFault triage, state machines, architecture principles, and LVGL patterns.

interface.shortDescription: Embedded C/C++ firmware toolbox with 4 agents and 8 skills
interface.longDescription: Embedded C/C++ firmware development toolbox for Cortex-M targets. Covers FreeRTOS tasks/ISR, Keil MDK builds (AC5/AC6), ARMCLANG, HardFault triage via .map analysis, state-machine design, architecture principles, and LVGL patterns. Battle-tested on real hardware projects.
defaultPrompt: Debug this HardFault on my Cortex-M firmware
Design a state machine for async motor control
Review this embedded C code for ISR safety
